description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat black base. The body is made of metal and shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and patches of faded paint. A black rubber hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured to the side, with a metal nozzle at the end. The top features a red lever handle and a metallic valve assembly, with a safety pin visible at the front. A large white label with red and black instructional text and pictograms is affixed to the front, providing usage instructions and safety information. The overall appearance suggests it is a standard portable fire extinguisher commonly found in urban environments such as garages, hallways, or public buildings.
description: A worn red metal fire extinguisher with a black hose, red handle, and a large instructional label on the front. The surface shows scuffs and faded paint, and the base is black and flat.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the black hose running vertically along the side and the red handle aligned with the top; the label is mostly out of sight.
description_view_1: The front-left view highlights the large white instructional label, the red handle, and the black hose curving forward.
description_view_2: The rear-right view shows the label partially visible, with the hose and handle seen from the side and the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: The back-right view displays the plain red metal surface with scuffs, the black hose, and the handle, with no label visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white rectangular label with red and black text and pictograms on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black rubber hose attached near the top, looping down the side, with a metallic nozzle at the end; hose is flexible and secured to the body.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Metal safety pin visible at the top front, inserted through the handle assembly.
